tools.name: scaffold_managed_skill
tools.description: Create or update a managed skill in ~/.vellum/workspace/skills. The skill becomes available for skill_load immediately.

skill_id.description: Unique identifier for the skill (lowercase slug, e.g. "my-skill").

description.description: Short description of what the skill does.

body_markdown.description: The full skill body in markdown - instructions, prompts, templates, etc.

emoji.description: Optional emoji icon for the skill.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing skill with the same ID (default: false).

add_to_index.description: Whether to add the skill to SKILLS.md index (default: true).

includes.description: Optional list of child skill IDs that this skill includes (metadata only, no auto-activation).

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of what you are creating and why, shown to the user as a status update. Use simple language a non-technical person would understand.

tools.name: delete_managed_skill
tools.description: Delete a managed skill from ~/.vellum/workspace/skills and remove it from the SKILLS.md index.

skill_id.description: The ID of the managed skill to delete.

remove_from_index.description: Whether to remove the skill from SKILLS.md index (default: true).

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of what you are deleting and why, shown to the user as a status update. Use simple language a non-technical person would understand.
